name_cn:
Platinum Edition郊쀮잺Authentic Packaging as shown
Chanel CF 23P New Color Pink
Full name Classic Flap
Dimensions: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Leather: Original Haas fine grain caviar
Hardware: 24K light gold plating
The classic CF has a charm that captivates at first sight, serving as a mobile label of elegance wherever you go. The pure white exudes a gentle and refined goddess vibe, paired with a gold clasp for exquisite luxury. It is truly a top choice for luxury entry-level enthusiasts~
